channel.title: Specification curve on Danielle Cosme
channel.description: Recent content in Specification curve on Danielle Cosme

item.title: Specification curve example
item.description: load packages library(tidyverse) library(lme4) library(MuMIn) library(cowplot) run models Run all possible nested models using the dredge function # set na.action for dredge options(na.action = "na.fail") # omit NAs airquality.na = airquality %>% na.omit() # run full model full.model = lm(Ozone ~ Solar.R + Wind + Temp + Month + Day, data = airquality.na) # run all possible nested models all.models = dredge(full.model, rank = "AIC") # set AIC for null model you want to compare model AIC values to null.
